decisions: Defined the two-loop mental model and chose agent-first interaction with deterministic state control.
shipped_learned_influenced: Created the original Product Career Ops architecture and clarified the development-search feedback loop.
feedback: The command interface should feel conversational; scripts should remain invisible.
evidence_candidates: Ability to translate an ambiguous personal workflow into a structured product system.
ai_misled: The initial plan overemphasized CLI interaction rather than the desired agent experience.
next_week: Use the development loop for one real leadership decision and evaluate one real opportunity.
